ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Quod Sedimentum Sanorum, Aegrorumque Corporum Non Eiusdem Speciei.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Adversus Ferdinandum Cassanum, & alios contrarium sentientes. ioanne Andrea Nola Crotoniata, Art. & Med. doctore, Clariss. Altimari discipulo, Auctore.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: In the preface, the author refers to the Altomareana Academy
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
